purpose: Compare public agent behavior with no skills, long-run-agent, cerberus-re, and both skills on reproducible reverse-engineering and mission-memory tasks.

configurations.label: No skills
configurations.expected_pressure: Baseline command discovery, evidence preservation, and documentation drift.

configurations.label: long-run-agent only
configurations.expected_pressure: Truth preservation, claim tracking, resumability, and user steering.

configurations.label: cerberus-re only
configurations.expected_pressure: RE artifact quality, command selection, and verification discipline.

configurations.label: cerberus-re + long-run-agent
configurations.expected_pressure: Static, dynamic, and instrumentation RE loop with durable mission memory.

tasks.label: Environment setup
acceptance_checks: Run the documented dependency install path in dry-run mode and record executable versus manual steps.
Run cerberus-re doctor when available, or record why it is unavailable.

tasks.label: Static evidence
acceptance_checks: Build or identify a public local fixture.
Import the fixture into Ghidra when available, or record the missing prerequisite.
Produce a durable static artifact containing at least one class, selector, string, symbol, or function when tooling is available.

tasks.label: Dynamic evidence
acceptance_checks: Run a bounded LLDB trace when LLDB and the fixture are available.
Preserve trace commands and generated JSON artifacts.
Separate runtime-hit claims from blocked or missing-prerequisite conditions.

tasks.label: Instrumentation evidence
acceptance_checks: Generate or validate a Frida script without live attach unless runtime permission is explicit.
If live Frida is unavailable, record the blocker without claiming runtime hits.
Keep hook-installation, zero-hit, and missing-target evidence distinct.

tasks.label: Mission memory
acceptance_checks: Record commands, claims, artifacts, failures, and next actions.
Interrupt and resume from durable files where the configuration permits.
Ensure important context is not left only in chat history.
